summary: Iteration 26 - Backend APIs working correctly (12/12 tests passed). Mood checkin returns different verses AND reflections on each call. Reading history endpoint functional. ISSUE: Profile stats navigation to /reading-progress not working on web (clicking stats or 'Cronologia Lettura' doesn't navigate).

integration_issues.issue: TouchableOpacity with onPress={() => router.push('/reading-progress')} not triggering navigation on web. Stats section and 'Cronologia Lettura' header clicks don't navigate.
Navigating directly to /reading-progress returns 'Unmatched Route' 404 error

action_items: Fix TouchableOpacity navigation issue in profile.tsx - stats and Cronologia Lettura should navigate to /reading-progress
Investigate why /reading-progress route returns 'Unmatched Route' on direct web access despite being registered in _layout.tsx
Consider using Link component from expo-router instead of TouchableOpacity with onPress for navigation
critical_code_review_comments: Profile.tsx line 372 and 397: router.push('/reading-progress') not working on web - may need Link component instead
reading-progress.tsx exists at /app/frontend/app/reading-progress.tsx and is registered in _layout.tsx at line 55, but web routing fails

success_rate.frontend: 70% - Mood checkin UI works, verse+reflection change verified. Profile navigation to reading-progress FAILING

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user. Reading history populated via tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend all working: /api/ai/mood-checkin returns verse:{ref,text} and reflection that change on each call using random.choice. /api/progress/reading/history returns reading history. ISSUE: On web, clicking profile stats or 'Cronologia Lettura' doesn't navigate to /reading-progress. Direct URL access to /reading-progress shows 'Unmatched Route'. The route IS registered in _layout.tsx. This appears to be a React Native Web routing issue.

mood_checkin_verse_change.notes: API uses random.choice to select different verses for same mood. Tested with 5 consecutive calls.

mood_checkin_reflection_change.notes: AI generates different reflections on each call, even when same verse is selected.

mood_checkin_english_key_mapping.notes: English mood keys (happy/hopeful) correctly mapped to Italian (felice/speranzoso) when lang=it

frontend_mood_ui.notes: Clicking mood emoji shows verse reference, text, and AI reflection. UI resets and shows loading on each click.

profile_stats_navigation.notes: TouchableOpacity with data-testid='progress-stats-btn' doesn't navigate on web

reading_progress_route.notes: Direct navigation to /reading-progress returns 'Unmatched Route' on web

rca_of_issue: The profile page uses TouchableOpacity with onPress={() => router.push('/reading-progress')}. On React Native Web, TouchableOpacity events may not properly propagate to trigger expo-router navigation. The reading-progress.tsx file exists and is registered in Stack.Screen, but web routing doesn't resolve it correctly. This could be due to: 1) Expo Router web compatibility issue, 2) Missing web-specific route configuration, or 3) TouchableOpacity click handler not properly executing on web platform.
